title: Innsbruck, Tyrol — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Innsbruck, Tyrol: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Innsbruck is a city in Tyrol with a population of 132,493. A stunning Alpine city surrounded by snow-capped peaks, a two-time Winter Olympics host with the iconic Golden Roof, imperial architecture, and year-round outdoor adventure.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
